sourceSummary.oneLine: IC test report CR740701AD Rev. 02 for Laird Technologies ST60-2230C and SU60-2230C 802.11 ac/a/b/g/n M.2 2230 + Bluetooth 4.2 module.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports IC/RSS compliance evidence for the Bluetooth EDR transmitter functions of the listed module models.
keyPoints: The tested sample was evaluated and declared in compliance with RSS-247 Issue 2 February 2017.
Model ST60-2230C was selected as representative for final test data.
Summary of test results reports Pass for conducted emissions, radiated emissions, band edge, conducted output power, hopping channels, channel separation, dwell time, and antenna requirement.
Maximum reported conducted output power is 10.83 dBm at 2402 MHz for GFSK.
Report Rev. 02 revised the model name and was issued Jul. 21, 2017.

entities.name: Laird Technologies
entities.evidence: Brand Name : Laird Technologies Applicant : Laird Technologies

entities.name: International Certification Corp.
entities.evidence: We, International Certification Corp., would like to declare that the tested sample has been evaluated

entities.name: SU60-2230C
entities.evidence: The following models are provided to this EUT. Brand Name Model Name ... Laird Technologies ST60-2230C ... SU60-2230C

concepts.name: Bluetooth EDR
concepts.evidence: Bluetooth EDR uses a combination of π/4-DQPSK and 8DPSK.

concepts.name: Frequency hopping systems in 2400-2483.5 MHz band
concepts.evidence: Frequency hopping systems in the 2400–2483.5 MHz band shall use at least 15 channels.

concepts.name: Dwell time
concepts.evidence: The average time of occupancy on any channel shall not be greater than 0.4 seconds

evidence.claim: The document is IC Test Report CR740701AD Rev. 02.
evidence.evidenceText: Report No.: CR740701AD Page : 1 of 58 Report Version: Rev. 02 IC Test Report

evidence.claim: The tested equipment is an 802.11 ac/a/b/g/n M.2 2230 + Bluetooth 4.2 module.
The EUT model list includes ST60-2230C and SU60-2230C.
evidence.evidenceText: The following models are provided to this EUT. Brand Name Model Name Product Name Description Laird Technologies ST60-2230C ... SU60-2230C

evidence.claim: ST60-2230C was selected as the representative model for final testing.
evidence.evidenceText: The above models, model ST60-2230C was selected as a representative one for the final test and only its data was recorded in this report.

evidence.claim: The applicant and brand are Laird Technologies.
evidence.evidenceText: Brand Name : Laird Technologies Applicant : Laird Technologies

evidence.claim: The applicable main standard on the cover is RSS-247 Issue 2 February 2017.
The listed test standards include RSS-247, RSS-Gen, ANSI C63.10, and ANSI C63.4.
evidence.evidenceText: RSS-247 Issue 2 February 2017 RSS-Gen Issue 4 November 2014 ANSI C63.10-2013 ANSI C63.4-2014

evidence.claim: The tested sample was declared compliant with the listed standard requirements.
evidence.evidenceText: the tested sample has been evaluated and in compliance with the requirement of the above standards

evidence.claim: Rev. 02 was issued on Jul. 21, 2017 for revised model name.
evidence.evidenceText: CR740701AD Rev. 02 Revised model name Jul. 21, 2017

evidence.claim: The summary of test results reports Pass for all listed IC rule test items.
evidence.evidenceText: Summary of Test Results IC Rules Test Items Measured Result ... Pass

evidence.claim: Maximum reported conducted output power is 10.83 dBm at 2402 MHz for GFSK.
The Bluetooth operating frequency range is 2400-2483.5 MHz with channels 2402-2480 MHz.
The test laboratory lists IC site registration No. 10807C-1.

reviewFlags.reason: Authority is stated as IC in the source text, while the source path references ISED; the text does not expand the authority name.
The document has multiple dates; documentDate uses the Rev. 02 issued date from the release record, while received and tested dates are separate.
